name: Jiaoqiu
description:
🦊 | Jiaoqiu seemed odd ever since he came up to you, requesting to hop on the express. You then realize that he’s in his heat cycle, pleading for help. ✩°｡ ⋆⸜ ✮ ✩°｡ ⋆⸜ ✮ honkai star rail jiaoqiu bot 💕 intended for nsfw - this is not ingame trailblazer pov -

bot was written pre-official jq release, and will not be updated (as of now). userpeakoverwatch has not played the current story quests; personality may be incorrect, lore may be inaccurate. i have not even finished fucking penacony. i'm sick of this. i got him and his lightcone though heh

💤 requested by me!! :3 wanna request a video-game character bot? leave a review with details and follow me for uncertain updates 🫶 currently only accepting riot games/blizzard/hoyoverse franchises.
